Who I am

About Me

I'm Nafidah Mauna — an IT Support professional based in Abu Dhabi, UAE, with 4+ years of hands-on experience across education and VVIP environments. I started in helpdesk, got good at fixing things fast, and then started asking why they kept breaking.

That question led me into AI automation and workflow building. Now I spend my free time building Make.com flows, n8n pipelines, and AI-powered tools using OpenAI, Claude, and ChatGPT. I'm also learning WordPress development and trying to understand how to make automation genuinely useful — not just flashy.

I'm passionate about ICT training and knowledge sharing — helping people understand technology without the jargon, and making complex tools feel approachable for everyday users.

Current goal: Transition into a full AI Automation Engineer role while continuing to build practical tools that solve real problems. Every project on GitHub is a step closer.
